upgrade_details.title: Solar Panels
upgrade_details.educational_note: Many factories use rooftop solar to reduce dependence on fossil fuels.

upgrade_details.title: Water Recycling
upgrade_details.educational_note: Water recycling systems help reduce freshwater waste in industrial processes.

upgrade_details.title: Wind Turbines
upgrade_details.short_description: Add renewable power to the factory grid.
upgrade_details.educational_note: Wind power helps industries lower carbon emissions while supplying electricity.

upgrade_details.title: Green Roofs
upgrade_details.short_description: Cool buildings and support urban biodiversity.
upgrade_details.educational_note: Green roofs can reduce heat buildup and create habitat for pollinators and plants.

upgrade_details.title: Electric Transport
upgrade_details.educational_note: Electric vehicles reduce local air pollution and lower fossil fuel use in transport.

upgrade_details.title: Urban Trees
upgrade_details.short_description: Add green buffers around the factory.
upgrade_details.educational_note: Tree belts help absorb carbon, improve air quality, and reduce heat around industrial zones.

upgrade_details.title: Carbon Capture
upgrade_details.educational_note: Carbon capture systems trap part of the CO₂ before it reaches the atmosphere.
